scope.target: Minimal conditional micro-system/mono-system logical repository grammar
constraints: Define only one logical grammar and workload mapping
workload means bounded context for micro-system and system for mono-system
Do not make physical layout universal
Do not expand into naming-detail or cross-profile migration design
non_goals: Review or modify dotnet-webapi-lab product code

steps: Defined the shared workload/DomainCore/Presentation logical grammar
Mapped workload to Bounded Context for micro-system repos and system for mono-system repos
Preserved target-owned physical layout and explicit shared capability groups
Recorded only the bounded CrossCutting/Domain Observability dependency rule
validation: Confirmed dependency direction remains independent from solution folders
AI-context ownership validates canonical and derived references
execution.last_completed_step: Completed the minimal conditional grammar without numeric naming, physical migration, or Observability design expansion.
execution.next_action: Execute MIGRATE-001 before ROUTE-001 as required by the approved gate order.

results.summary: Defined one logical .slnx grammar for consistent navigation across micro-system and mono-system repositories, with target-specific workload mapping and no forced physical layout.
tests_run: AI-context validator passed with PROJECT-GRAMMAR-001 ownership
results.residual_risk: Full Observability/AOP design remains intentionally deferred in OBS-001; this task retains only the CrossCutting ownership and Domain non-dependency boundary.
